steps.title: Hardware Identification
steps.content: Verify TD21 rack body, lock bar, and screws.

es.title: Identificación de Herrajes
es.content: Verify TD21 rack body, lock bar, and screws.

steps.title: Secure Rack
steps.content: Bolt rack base securely to trailer rail or wall framing.

es.title: Secure Rack
es.content: Bolt rack base securely to trailer rail or wall framing.

steps.title: Lock Shovels
steps.content: Place shovel shafts into organizing hooks, swing securement bar shut, and engage lock.

es.title: Lock Shovels
es.content: Place shovel shafts into organizing hooks, swing securement bar shut, and engage lock.
